analysis_summary.title: Poison/Toxin/DoT EventHandler Analysis
analysis_summary.description: Analysis of Damage-Over-Time (DoT) event handlers in the Menace tactical game, including poison-like effects, bleeding, and regeneration systems.

DamageOverTimeHandler.description: Main handler for poison/toxin/corrosive damage-over-time effects that tick at turn end

functions.name: ApplyDamage
functions.purpose: Applies DoT damage tick with two paths: armor-only or standard HP damage

functions.name: OnCalculateExpectedDamage
functions.purpose: Calculates expected damage for AI decision making and UI preview

functions.name: OnTurnEnd
functions.purpose: Main tick trigger - applies damage at end of affected entity's turn

0x5c.name: PercentDamage
0x5c.description: Percentage of max HP per tick

0x60.name: FlatDamageFromMaxHP
0x60.description: Flat bonus damage derived from max HP

0x68.name: PercentDamageFromElementCount
0x68.description: Damage scaling per element in unit

0x74.name: ArmorDamageOnly
0x74.description: If true, only damages armor durability (not HP)

0x78.name: ArmorDmgFlat
0x78.description: Flat armor damage when ArmorDamageOnly is true

0x7c.name: ArmorDmgPctCurrent
0x7c.description: Percentage of current armor as damage

0x84.name: ArmorDmgFlat2
0x84.description: Secondary flat armor damage / Armor penetration

0x8c.name: FatalityType
0x8c.description: Death animation type when DoT kills

damage_formulas.standard_damage: FlatDamage + ceil(MaxHP * PercentDamage) with minimum 1 damage

DamageOverTime.description: Effect data class and factory for DamageOverTimeHandler

functions.name: Create
functions.purpose: Factory method - instantiates DamageOverTimeHandler and assigns effect data

functions.name: CalculateExpectedDamage
functions.purpose: Preview calculation for UI/AI

functions.name: CalculateArmorDamageForTarget
functions.purpose: Calculates armor durability damage when ArmorDamageOnly is true

BleedOutTileEffectHandler.description: Handles bleeding/downed state for unit leaders with countdown timer

functions.name: OnRoundStart
functions.purpose: Decrements bleeding countdown each round, kills leader when timer expires

functions.name: OnAdded
functions.purpose: Initializes bleeding state, creates UI icon, sets HealthStatus to BleedingOut

functions.name: OnRemoved
functions.purpose: Cleanup when bleeding effect is removed

functions.name: StabilizeLeader
functions.purpose: Called when leader is stabilized/healed

DamageHandler.description: Immediate damage handler (non-DoT) - base class pattern shared with DoT

functions.name: ApplyDamage
functions.purpose: Applies immediate damage using similar field layout to DamageOverTime

RegenerationHandler.description: Healing over time handler - inverse of DamageOverTime

functions.name: ApplyEffect
functions.purpose: Main healing function - restores HP based on percentage

functions.name: OnTurnEnd
functions.purpose: Trigger healing when ApplicationTiming == 1 (OnTurnEnd)

functions.name: OnTurnStart
functions.purpose: Trigger healing when ApplicationTiming == 0 (OnTurnStart)

functions.name: OnUse
functions.purpose: Trigger healing when ApplicationTiming == 2 (OnUse)

effect_data_layout.0x5c: HealPercentage (float) - percentage of max HP to heal

ApplySkillTileEffectHandler.description: Generic tile effect that applies skills (can include DoT skills) on various triggers

functions.name: ApplySkill
functions.purpose: Core method that validates conditions and applies the skill

functions.name: OnTurnEnd
functions.purpose: Trigger on turn end (flag 0x04)

functions.name: OnTurnStart
functions.purpose: Trigger on turn start

functions.name: OnEnter
functions.purpose: Trigger when entity enters tile

functions.name: OnMovementFinished
functions.purpose: Trigger after movement completion

ApplyStatusEffectTileEffectHandler.description: Applies status effects (potentially including DoT) when entities enter/leave tiles

functions.name: OnEnter
functions.purpose: Apply status effect when entity enters tile

functions.name: OnLeave
functions.purpose: Remove status effect when entity leaves tile

functions.name: AppendTooltipData
functions.purpose: Provides tooltip information for UI

entity_fields.description: Entity fields accessed during DoT calculations

tactical_manager_events.description: Events fired by DoT system through TacticalManager singleton

events.name: OnTurnEnd
events.description: Main turn end event that triggers DoT ticks

dot_application_pattern: 1. OnTurnEnd is called by TacticalManager at end of entity's turn
2. Handler checks if ArmorDamageOnly (0x74) is true
3. If armor-only: calculate armor damage and call SetArmorDurability
4. If standard: create DamageInfo object with all damage parameters
5. Call entity's virtual damage method (vtable offset 0x5a8)
6. Fire appropriate TacticalManager events for UI updates

creating_custom_dot_effects: DoT effects are created via DamageOverTime.Create() factory
Configure damage parameters in effect data at offsets 0x58-0x94

trigger_timing.OnTurnEnd: Standard DoT trigger - applies at end of affected unit's turn
trigger_timing.OnRoundStart: Used by bleeding - counts down each tactical round

damage_scaling: Flat damage at 0x58 provides base damage
Percent damage at 0x5c scales with target max HP
Element count scaling at 0x68/0x6c for multi-element units
Armor penetration at 0x84 reduces effective armor in calculations
